name: AREthGetValuePhys
title: AREthGetValuePhys
syntax: float AREthGetValuePhys( dword objectHandle, char valuePath[] );
description: This function can be used to read out a physical value from the object specified in the objectHandle parameter.
All necessary information such as data type and conversion formula must be stored in the FIBEX database.

parameters.name: objectHandle
parameters.description: Handle to a AUTOSAR Eth IL Object.The following objects are supported: Messages Fields Method calls: Handle to a method call that was created with AREthCreateMethodCall.

parameters.name: valuePath
parameters.description: Path of the value to be read out.For specification of complex paths, a corresponding syntax must be adhered to (see also Syntax for Database-based Access Paths).

description: In this example, it is assumed that the created method is contained in the FIBEX database that is assigned to the CANoe configuration. The method has the Method ID 31, two input parameters Member_value1 and Member_value2, and a return parameter Result. For the variables Member_value1 and Member_value2 a factor and offset is set in the database.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
